source: real in-game capture (replay played back in 15.5 client, screen-recorded)

title: 135K Damage, Still a Defeat — Wisconsin
caption: Sometimes you do everything right and the team still finds a way to lose it. 135K on the Wisconsin at golden hour. We've all been there. 🫡 #WorldOfWarships
